rationale: Only option with existing reusable enumeration precedent (_load_skills, _load_skill_catalog, parse_skill_frontmatter) and a live test pattern to extend; scored 10/12 vs Option A 0/12 (no read channel into Claude Code's internal tool defs) and Option B 6/12 (tools/list absent from mcp_call.py, .mcp.json has zero configured servers).
rule: Option C — derive Anthropic tools[] catalog from little-loops' own skills/*/SKILL.md, commands/*.md, agents/*.md frontmatter
alternatives_rejected: Option A: Claude Code internal tool/skill definitions (no read-access boundary exists); Option B: MCP tools/list surface (must be built from scratch, nothing to enumerate today)
